overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's downtown district at night. The journey progresses from a covered pedestrian walkway under an overpass, through an open plaza with trees, and onto a busy commercial street lined with towering skyscrapers and glowing digital billboards. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights, creating a quintessential cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: futuristic silver vehicle drives past from right to left across the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: character in dark jacket and shorts walking steadily across the yellow-striped crosswalk under the overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure with illuminated edges creating a tunnel-like effect
large structural support columns lining the left side of the walkway
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
digital speed limit display showing 40 mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character crossing a wide pedestrian crosswalk under a massive concrete overpass. A futuristic vehicle passes by on the right, its headlights cutting through the artificial lighting. The environment is semi-covered with large support pillars lining the walkway, and the wet concrete reflects the overhead lights.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with trees and concrete benches

agents.ego_description: character walking through the open plaza, passing by landscaped areas with trees

entered.detail: mature trees planted in large concrete planters providing greenery
modern concrete seating arranged along the walkway
tall modern structure with illuminated windows and Night City signage
illuminated sign with distinctive cyberpunk lettering

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open urban plaza featuring landscaped trees in concrete planters and modern benches. The Night City sign glows in the distance atop a glass building, while the wet tiled ground reflects the ambient city lights. The space transitions from enclosed to open with partial sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza edge transitioning to street underpass

events.description: approaching street level with traffic barriers and overpass structure becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: character continuing forward along the plaza edge, moving toward the street underpass

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall lining the left side of the path
red and white striped construction barriers near the street entrance
massive concrete highway overpass with illuminated strip lighting underneath
metal staircase and escalator leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the character moves along a concrete wall barrier toward a street underpass. Traffic barriers and construction elements appear near the road entrance, while the massive overpass structure looms ahead with its distinctive linear lighting. The plaza trees recede to the left as the environment becomes more urban and structured.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy street under overpass with heavy traffic

events.description: emerging from underpass into area dominated by bright digital billboards and neon signage
multiple vehicles pass by on the right with motion blur from their lights

agents.ego_description: character walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, turning left to follow the street

notable_agents.action: stream of cars driving past on the wet street, headlights creating light trails

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screens covering building facades with cyberpunk imagery
tall glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows reaching into the night sky
tropical trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: The character moves under the massive overpass structure where the lighting shifts to vibrant neon from enormous digital billboards covering the buildings. The scene opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers and busy street traffic with vehicles creating light trails on the wet asphalt. Palm trees line the street as the environment becomes distinctly commercial and high-density.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with continuous digital advertising

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the sidewalk past benches and planters, with heavy traffic flowing on the right

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the street with headlights illuminating the wet road

entered.detail: orange and black modern seating along the pedestrian walkway
concrete and metal divider separating sidewalk from vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the character along a busy commercial sidewalk lined with orange benches and planters. Towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards dominate the left side while moderate traffic flows on the right. The wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon advertisements, maintaining the cyberpunk atmosphere as the journey continues down the illuminated city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete underpass into the vibrant, high-density commercial heart of Night City. It begins by following a character across a wide pedestrian crosswalk beneath a massive overpass, where wet concrete reflects artificial lights and a futuristic vehicle speeds past. As the character emerges from the covered walkway, the environment opens into a landscaped urban plaza with glowing signs and glass buildings before narrowing again along a concrete barrier toward a street underpass. The scene then shifts dramatically as the camera moves under the looming overpass structure, where the lighting transforms into vibrant neon from enormous digital billboards and towering skyscrapers. Finally, the path expands onto a busy commercial sidewalk lined with orange benches and palm trees, with the wet asphalt reflecting a kaleidoscope of advertisements as the character continues down the illuminated street.
